content: Polyunsaturated fats, found in modern vegetable oils like soybean oil, can accumulate in the body over four years.
Switching from soybean oil to coconut oil can reduce polyunsaturated fat levels in the body within four years.
After switching from a high PUFA diet to a traditional fat diet, vitamin E requirements may remain elevated for up to four years.
To maintain adequate vitamin E levels while reducing PUFA intake, consuming 4 tablespoons of palm oil per day is recommended.
A low-dose vitamin E supplement, such as Jarrow Formulas Toco-Sorb, containing 19 IU of alpha-tocopherol, is recommended for those transitioning from a high PUFA diet.
